name: coding-agents
description: 対象 jobsite の Git root に .coding-agents 状態を置き、固定ロール scaffold と明示的な scoped assignment packet で intake / planning / audit、source-change gate、DEBUG 根本原因ゲート、metacognitive source-change/debug/repair gate を支援する。

interface.shortDescription: Target-repo intake, fixed role scaffold, scoped assignment packets, audit, source-change gates, debug gates, and context-impact checks.
interface.longDescription: Resolves the jobsite or explicit --target-cwd repository, stores .coding-agents state under that target git root, and records a fixed role scaffold plus optional scoped assignment packets for parent-managed specialist work. It supports intake, planning, audit, source-change metacognitive gating, debug root-cause integrity, and metacognitive context-impact checks without implying resident agents are active.
defaultPrompt: Run Coding Agents intake for this target repo.
Create Coding Agents scoped assignment packets for this active task.
